title: L2 budget.allow Payload
description: Pre-call verdict payload emitted by budget_verdict when usage <90% AND data fresh. cycle-098 Sprint 2A.

usd_used.description: Cumulative paid usage for current UTC day (PRE-call; does not yet include estimated_usd_for_call).

usd_remaining.description: daily_cap_usd - usd_used. May be negative if cap exceeded mid-flight.

estimated_usd_for_call.description: Caller-supplied cost estimate for the proposed paid call.

billing_api_age_seconds.description: Seconds since the most recent billing API timestamp. null if billing API was not consulted.

counter_age_seconds.description: Seconds since the most recent budget.record_call event for this provider/aggregate.

provider.description: Provider id (e.g., 'anthropic', 'openai', 'bedrock') or 'aggregate' for cross-provider verdicts.

utc_day.description: UTC calendar day this verdict applies to (YYYY-MM-DD).

cycle_id.description: Optional caller-supplied cycle identifier for cross-referencing.

billing_observer_used.description: Whether a billing-observer command was invoked (vs counter-only fallback).
